title: Haribhakti & Co is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Haribhakti & Co is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Haribhakti & Co is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Dhanbad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Haribhakti & Co:
Haribhakti & Co is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in SAP FICO

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Haribhakti & Co!
